title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN FERNANDO HIGH SCHOOL IN SAN FERNANDO, MASBATE, TO ANDRES CLEMENTE JR. HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 18248 / 85 OG No. 51, 72 Supp (Dec. 18, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6804, December 12, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN FERNANDO HIGH SCHOOL IN SAN FERNANDO, MASBATE, TO ANDRES CLEMENTE JR. HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the San Fernando High School in San Fernando, Masbate, is hereby changed to Andres Clemente, Jr. High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 18, 1989 and September 22, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: December 12, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
